headline: Will Inclusion in the Russell Small Cap Value Index Reframe Lamb Weston’s (LW) Valuation Story?
summary: On 20 March 2026, Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. was added to the Russell Small Cap Value Index, marking its inclusion in a widely followed benchmark for smaller value-oriented companies. This index addition can broaden Lamb Weston’s visibility among institutional and passive investors who track Russell value indices, potentially influencing how the stock is viewed in diversified portfolios. We’ll now examine how Lamb Weston’s inclusion in the Russell Small Cap Value Index may influence its...
